subcategory: drag-and-drop file-uploader with progress tracking and preview generation
use_cases: Upload documents, images, and media files with drag-and-drop interface
Track upload progress with animated progress indicators
Support multiple file types with contextual icons
Manage uploaded files with delete and expand/collapse functionality
ai_summary: A futuristic file uploader component with drag-and-drop support, real-time upload progress simulation, and file type detection. Features image preview generation, multiple file type icons (documents, video, audio, code, archives), and smooth animations including pulse effects on file selection. Supports file expansion/collapse and deletion, making it suitable for modern SaaS applications, content management systems, and any platform requiring file upload functionality with a sleek, modern aesthetic.
